original_text:
### Brand Name & Trademark Usage
- Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).
- Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
- Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.
- Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

relations.note: The first-mention trademark form specifies how the all-caps brand name is paired with its generic name and registered-mark symbol.

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials
Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).

rules.intent: Maintain the approved patient-marketing brand-name presentation.
rules.rule_text: In patient marketing written materials, write the brand name only as “LISRAYA” in all caps; this supersedes the February 2026 general guide’s title-case rule.

quotes: Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.

Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.

rules.intent: Ensure approved trademark and generic-name treatment without repeated trademark symbols.
rules.rule_text: For external-facing documents, use “LISRAYA® (brepocitinib)” only on the first or most prominent mention when the generic name is included. Format the generic name in lowercase parentheses as “(brepocitinib)”; do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions and do not use ® without the generic name.

quotes: sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections
Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

rules.intent: Keep parent-company attribution confined to the approved footer treatment.
rules.rule_text: The parent-company sign-off, “Priovant Therapeutics, Inc.,” is reserved for the locked footer; do not add it within sections.
